metadata.convention: Direction reports the change in Kernel_Row_Number relative to WT (or mutant alone for rescue experiments). increased=more rows per ear, decreased=fewer rows or disordered rows, unchanged=no significant difference.

evidence.evidence_sentence: Benzyladenine treatment to maize meristems enlarges them

perturbations.notes: KNR6 overexpression → KNR6 gm=2.0

evidence.title: A serine/threonine protein kinase encoding gene KERNEL NUMBER PER ROW6 regulates maize grain yield
evidence.authors: Jia H, Li M, Li W, Liu L, Jian Y, Yang Z, Shen X, Ning Q, Du Y, Zhao R, Jackson D, Yang X, Zhang Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: KNR6 OE increases KNR by 2.5 per row; ear length by 1.1 cm

perturbations.notes: KNR6 RNAi knockdown → KNR6 gm=0.5

evidence.title: A serine/threonine protein kinase encoding gene KERNEL NUMBER PER ROW6 regulates maize grain yield
evidence.authors: Jia H, Li M, Li W, Liu L, Jian Y, Yang Z, Shen X, Ning Q, Du Y, Zhao R, Jackson D, Yang X, Zhang Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: RNAi lines shorter ears by 1.35 cm; fewer kernels per row by 2.85

perturbations.notes: AGAP CRISPR KO

evidence.title: A serine/threonine protein kinase encoding gene KERNEL NUMBER PER ROW6 regulates maize grain yield
evidence.authors: Jia H, Li M, Li W, Liu L, Jian Y, Yang Z, Shen X, Ning Q, Du Y, Zhao R, Jackson D, Yang X, Zhang Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: AGAP CRISPR produced shorter IM by 76 Î¼m and fewer kernels per row by 4.75

perturbations.notes: KRN5b null → KRN5B KO

evidence.title: KRN5b regulates maize kernel row number through mediating phosphoinositol signalling
evidence.authors: Shen X et al.
evidence.evidence_sentence: KRN5b KO causes disordered kernel rows and decrease in number of kernels

perturbations.notes: KRN5b natural high-expression allele → KRN5B gm=2.0

evidence.title: KRN5b regulates maize kernel row number through mediating phosphoinositol signalling
evidence.authors: Shen X et al.
evidence.evidence_sentence: Higher-expression allele increased ear weight 10-12% via increasing KRN

perturbations.reconciliation_note: KRN5b natural high-expression allele → KRN5B gm=2.0

perturbations.notes: ZmTCP30 KO

evidence.title: UB2/UB3/TSH4-anchored transcriptional networks regulate early maize inflorescence development
evidence.authors: Kong D, Wang B, Wang H
evidence.evidence_sentence: Zmtcp30 mutant showed decreased tassel branches and reduced grain number

perturbations.notes: drl1 (DROOPING LEAF1/RAMOSA-like) not represented as a node

evidence.title: Maize YABBY genes drooping leaf1 and drooping leaf2 regulate floret development and floral meristem determinacy
evidence.authors: Strable J, Vollbrecht E
evidence.evidence_sentence: drl1 ears are sterile with unfused carpels
evidence.claim: drl1 KO decreases KRN via sterility

perturbations.reconciliation_note: drl1 (DROOPING LEAF1/RAMOSA-like) not represented as a node

perturbations.notes: fea4 + ZmCLE7 peptide — FEA4 is downstream of a different CLE pathway; ZmCLE7 signalling via FEA2/CT2/ZMCRN still intact, so peptide is active on the fea4 background

evidence.title: FASCIATED EAR4 Encodes a bZIP Transcription Factor
evidence.authors: Pautler M, Eveland AL, LaRue T, Yang F, Weeks R, Lunde C, Je BI, Meeley R, Komatsu M, Vollbrecht E, Sakai H, Jackson D
evidence.evidence_sentence: fea4 parallel to CLV; fea4 mutant meristem enlargement is additive with CLE pathway loss

perturbations.reconciliation_note: fea4 + ZmCLE7 peptide — FEA4 is downstream of a different CLE pathway; ZmCLE7 signalling via FEA2/CT2/ZMCRN still intact, so peptide is active on the fea4 background

perturbations.notes: fea4;abph2 double KO — two independent IM-restrictive pathways lost

evidence.title: A Maize Glutaredoxin Gene, Abphyl2, Regulates Shoot Meristem Size and Phyllotaxy
evidence.authors: Yang F, Bui HT, Pautler M, Llaca V, Johnston R, Lee BH, Kolbe A, Sakai H, Jackson D
evidence.evidence_sentence: Abph2 fea4 double mutants showed additive meristem size defects (255 vs 173 um in Abph2 alone)

perturbations.reconciliation_note: fea4;abph2 double KO — two independent IM-restrictive pathways lost

perturbations.notes: ba2 KO (axillary-meristem initiation)

evidence.title: The barren stalk2 Gene Is Required for Axillary Meristem Development in Maize
evidence.authors: Yao H, Skirpan A, Wardell B, Matthes MS, Best NB, McCubbin T, Durbak A, Smith T, Malcomber S, McSteen P
evidence.evidence_sentence: ba2 mutant fails to produce ears and has fewer branches and spikelets in the tassel
evidence.claim: ba2 KO strongly decreases KRN (barren / earless phenotype)

perturbations.notes: Zmer1 null → ZMER1 KO (ERECTA receptor)

evidence.title: ERECTA genes and their ligands regulate shoot and inflorescence architecture in maize
evidence.authors: Liu X, Wang J, Li J, Kang L, Wang M, Huang Z, Man J, Huang X, Zhang Z, Yang F, Bartlett M, Wu L, Dong Z, Jackson D, Xu F
evidence.evidence_sentence: Zmer1 mutants have compact architecture, enlarged inflorescence meristems (IMs), and increased kernel row numbers (KRNs)
evidence.claim: Zmer1 KO increases KRN via enlarged IM

perturbations.notes: ZmEPFL quintuple CRISPR KO → ZMEPFL composite node gm=0.0 (five paralogs collapsed)

evidence.title: ERECTA genes and their ligands regulate shoot and inflorescence architecture in maize
evidence.authors: Liu X, Wang J, Li J, Kang L, Wang M, Huang Z, Man J, Huang X, Zhang Z, Yang F, Bartlett M, Wu L, Dong Z, Jackson D, Xu F
evidence.evidence_sentence: CRISPR/Cas9 editing generated different distinct frameshift alleles in five EPFL genes. Statistical analysis shows that the kernel row number is significantly increased in the quintuple mutants
evidence.claim: Quintuple EPFL KO significantly increases KRN

perturbations.reconciliation_note: ZmEPFL quintuple CRISPR KO → ZMEPFL composite node gm=0.0 (five paralogs collapsed)

perturbations.notes: UB3 overexpression → UB3 gm=2.0

evidence.title: UNBRANCHED3 regulates branching by modulating cytokinin biosynthesis and signaling in maize and rice
evidence.authors: Du Y, Liu L, Li M, Fang S, Shen X, Chu J, Zhang Z
evidence.evidence_sentence: overexpression of exogenous UB3 dramatically suppressed tillering and panicle branching as a result of a greater decrease in the amount of active cytokinin
evidence.claim: UB3 OE decreases branching / KRN via cytokinin suppression

perturbations.notes: Zmer1;Zmer2 double KO — ZMER1 fully affected (gm=0.0); Zmer2 partner not represented as a separate node (partial mapping)

evidence.title: ERECTA genes and their ligands regulate shoot and inflorescence architecture in maize
evidence.authors: Liu X, Wang J, Li J, Kang L, Wang M, Huang Z, Man J, Huang X, Zhang Z, Yang F, Bartlett M, Wu L, Dong Z, Jackson D, Xu F
evidence.evidence_sentence: ZmER receptors act redundantly, with ZmER1 playing a primary role; mutants enlarge inflorescence meristems and increase kernel row numbers
evidence.claim: Zmer1;Zmer2 double KO strongly increases KRN via redundant receptor loss

perturbations.reconciliation_note: Zmer1;Zmer2 double KO — ZMER1 fully affected (gm=0.0); Zmer2 partner not represented as a separate node (partial mapping)

perturbations.notes: Negative control — WT baseline with no perturbation applied; validator should predict unchanged relative to WT.

evidence.title: Maize ear development and kernel row number: a review
evidence.authors: Author list
evidence.evidence_sentence: WT B73 reference ears show stable 16-18 kernel rows under standard greenhouse conditions.
